title: About us
text: HousingBook is a real-time platform for booking housing and vehicles. We bring buildings, rooms, and a vehicle fleet together in one place, so you can find what you need in a couple of clicks — no calls, no waiting for confirmation.

realtime.title: Instant booking
realtime.text: Your booking is confirmed immediately — no waiting for a manager.

chat.title: Live chat
chat.text: Direct line to the administration for any question.

variety.title: Housing and vehicles
variety.text: Rooms, buildings, and vehicles in one catalog.

multilingual.title: Three languages
multilingual.text: Interface in Russian, English, and Tajik.
